name: Dogfight
author: Poki
description: Dogfight throws you straight into the skies of World War II in an epic air battle game! Hop in your fighter plane, pull off loops, rolls, and sharp turns, and take down enemy aircraft in thrilling aerial combat. Ready to rule the skies and become the ace of the battlefield? Take off now! How to play Dogfight? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Fire: J Weapon: K Sharp turn: Q or E Roll: Shift Reload: R Pitch: the space bar Zoom out: U Zoom in: I Who created Dogfight? Dogfight is created by Devoting. Play their other games on Poki: Tiger Tank and Fury Warship ! How can I play Dogfight for free? You can play Dogfight for free on Poki. Can I play Dogfight on mobile devices and desktop? Dogfight can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
